name: Bulgur wheat with mixed peppers and goat cheese
intro: Sweet, crunchy bell peppers and creamy goat cheese are a winning combination. Bulgur wheat is a great staple for your pantry—it’s a source of fiber and protein, and very easy to prepare.

ingredients.item: salt and freshly ground black pepper
orange bell pepper, seeded and diced
yellow bell pepper, seeded and diced
handful of fresh mint leaves, finely chopped

method: Put the bulgur wheat in a large bowl, and pour over enough stock to just cover the bulgur. Let stand for 10 minutes, then stir with a fork to fluff up the grains. Season with salt and pepper to taste.

Add the scallions, orange and yellow bell peppers, paprika, mint, and lemon juice, and stir well. Taste, and season again, if needed. To serve, top with the goat cheese and a generous drizzle of olive oil.
